title: epidendrum andinum
intro: Epidendrum andinum, also known as the Andean Epidendrum or Lady's Tresses, is a species of orchid native to South America. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Epidendrum andinum include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
